children.text: Importance for People & Animals
children.translation: 植物对人类与动物的重要性

children.text: First, plants are very useful for people.
children.translation: 首先，植物对人类非常有用。

children.text: They can meet our basic needs.
children.translation: 它们可以满足我们的基本需求。

children.text: For example, they give us food and medicine.
children.translation: 例如，它们给我们提供食物和药物。

children.text: Second, plants are important for animals.
children.translation: 第二，植物对动物很重要。

children.text: Many animals live in the forest because it is their home.
children.translation: 许多动物生活在森林里，因为那是它们的家。

children.text: They can also eat the fruit of plants.
children.translation: 它们也可以吃植物的果实。

children.text: Importance for the Environment
children.translation: 植物对环境的重要性

children.text: Third, plants play an important role in protecting the environment.
children.translation: 第三，植物在保护环境方面发挥着重要作用。
children.highlight: Third, play an important role in, protecting

children.text: They help clean the air and cover the soil.
children.translation: 它们帮助净化空气并覆盖土壤。
children.highlight: clean the air, cover the soil

children.text: They can also stop the wind.
children.translation: 它们还可以防风。

children.text: Without plants, our planet will be in danger.
children.translation: 没有植物，我们的星球将处于危险之中。

children.text: Importance for People & Animals
children.translation: 植物对人类与动物的重要性

children.text: To begin with, plants can meet our basic needs by providing us with food, medicine, and clean oxygen.
children.translation: 首先，植物可以通过为我们提供食物、药物和清洁的氧气来满足我们的基本需求。
children.highlight: To begin with, meet our basic needs, food, medicine

children.text: Furthermore, plants play an important role in supporting wildlife.
children.translation: 此外，植物在维持野生动植物生存方面发挥着重要作用。
children.highlight: Furthermore, play an important role in

children.text: Forests are home to thousands of animals, where they can live safely and eat various kinds of fruit.
children.translation: 森林是成千上万种动物的家园，它们可以在那里安全地生活并食用各种水果。

children.text: In fact, many animals cannot survive without the protection of trees.
children.translation: 事实上，没有树木的保护，许多动物就无法生存。

children.text: Importance for the Environment
children.translation: 植物对环境的重要性

children.text: In addition, plants are crucial for the environment we live on.
children.translation: 另外，植物对我们生存的环境至关重要。

children.text: They help clean the air and cover the soil to prevent soil loss.
children.translation: 它们帮助净化空气并覆盖土壤以防止水土流失。
children.highlight: clean the air, cover the soil

children.text: During heavy storms, they can also stop the strong wind.
children.translation: 在强风暴期间，它们还可以阻挡强风。

children.text: In order to create a lively and healthy ecosystem, we must realize that all lives on this planet are connected.
children.translation: 为了创造一个充满活力和健康的生态系统，我们必须意识到这个星球上的所有生命都是相连的。
children.highlight: In order to, lively, healthy, ecosystem, planet, connected
